ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: This workflow contains a step that could not be loaded. Please delete the step to be able to run this workflow. If you’re on mobile, this may be a user script step that did not load.
ast.target: 此工作流包含一个无法加载的步骤。请删除该步骤以运行此工作流。如果您在移动设备上，这可能是一个未加载的用户脚本步骤。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: To begin, find or create a folder somewhere in your vault in which you would like to create your novel. Right-click it and select Create Longform Project.
ast.target: 首先，在您的保险库中找到或创建一个文件夹，您希望在其中创建您的小说。右键单击它并选择创建Longform项目。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Waiting for Obsidian Sync to complete...
ast.target:
\n
正在等待Obsidian同步完成...

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: You can view the docs and an explanation of what this migration does here.
ast.target: 您可以在此处查看文档以及此迁移操作的说明。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: User Script Steps are automatically loaded from this folder. Changes to .js files in this folder are synced with Longform after a slight delay. If your script does not appear here or in the Compile tab, you may have an error in your script—check the dev console for it.
ast.target: 用户脚本步骤会从此文件夹自动加载。对此文件夹中.js文件的更改会在短暂延迟后与Longform同步。如果您的脚本未显示在此处或编译选项卡中，您的脚本中可能存在错误——请检查开发控制台。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Longform written and maintained by Kevin Barrett.
ast.target: Longform由Kevin Barrett编写和维护。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Read the source code and report issues at https://github.com/kevboh/longform.
ast.target: 在https://github.com/kevboh/longform阅读源代码并报告问题。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Icon made by Zlatko Najdenovski from www.flaticon.com.
ast.target: 图标由Zlatko Najdenovski制作，来自www.flaticon.com。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: A single-scene project is a single note, perhaps a short story or essay, that includes its own YAML frontmatter which is used by Longform to track your project.
ast.target: 单场景项目是一个单独的笔记，可能是一个短篇故事或文章，它包含自己的YAML前置数据，Longform使用这些数据来跟踪您的项目。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: A multi-scene project is comprised of many ordered notes, called “scenes,” that you can combine together into your manuscript. It also includes an index file, the YAML frontmatter of which is used by Longform to track your project.
ast.target: 多场景项目由许多有序的笔记组成，称为“场景”，您可以将它们组合成您的手稿。它还包括一个索引文件，其YAML前置数据被Longform用于跟踪您的项目。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Choose a step from the following options to add to your current compile
    workflow.
ast.target: 从以下选项中选择一个步骤，添加到您当前的编译工作流中。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Create a new workflow to begin →

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Longform has been upgraded and requires a migration to a new format.
      Deprecated index files will be deleted, and some scene files may move.
      It’s recommended to back up your vault before migrating.
ast.target: Longform已升级，需要迁移到新格式。已弃用的索引文件将被删除，部分场景文件可能会移动。建议在迁移前备份您的保险库。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Create a new version of this project. Use the name/version field below to
    give your draft an internal name that describes it relative to the larger
    project.
ast.target: 创建此项目的新版本。使用下方的名称/版本字段为您的草稿指定一个内部名称，以描述其相对于整个项目的关系。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Because this project type involves multiple notes, Longform will create
        an enclosing folder for your project and its scenes. You can always
        rename the folder, the index file, or both.
ast.target: 由于此项目类型涉及多个笔记，Longform将为您的项目及其场景创建一个包含文件夹。您随时可以重命名文件夹、索引文件或两者。

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 所有项目中撰写的总字数

ast.name: addOption
ast.target: 每个场景或单场景项目

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: as a .json file in the longform/ plugin folder
ast.target: 作为longform/插件文件夹中的.json文件

ast.name: addOption
ast.source: as a file in your vault

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Longform] 手动加载前置数据时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: [Longform] 没有用于保存会话的 manifest.dir。

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Longform] Error appending deprecation notice to old index file
ast.target: [Longform] 向旧索引文件追加弃用通知时出错

ast.name: log
ast.target: [Longform] 迁移期间创建文件夹时出错

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Longform] File in user script folder modified, reloading scripts…
ast.target: [Longform] 用户脚本文件夹中的文件已修改，正在重新加载脚本…

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Longform] Waiting for active sync to complete...
ast.target: [Longform] 正在等待活动同步完成...

ast.name: log
ast.source: [Longform] No workflows found; adding default workflow.
ast.target: [Longform] 未找到工作流；正在添加默认工作流。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, all scenes in the current draft will be copied to the new one.
ast.target: 如果开启，当前草稿中的所有场景都将被复制到新草稿中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, shows numbers for scenes with subscenes separated by periods, e.g. 1.1.2. Create subscenes by dragging a scene to an indent under an existing scene, or us an indent command.
ast.target: 如果开启，在场景选项卡中显示带有子场景的场景编号，用句点分隔，例如1.1.2。通过将场景拖动到现有场景下的缩进位置，或使用缩进命令来创建子场景。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can always manually start a new session by running the Longform: Start New Writing Session command. Turning this off will cause writing sessions to carry over across multiple days until you manually start a new one.
ast.target: 您随时可以通过运行Longform: 开始新的写作会话命令手动开始新会话。关闭此选项将导致写作会话跨越多天持续，直到您手动开始新的会话。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A number of words to target for a given writing session.
ast.target: 给定写作会话的目标字数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: You can set your word count goal to target all Longform writing, or you can make each project or scene have its own discrete goal.
ast.target: 您可以将字数目标设定为针对所有Longform写作，也可以让每个项目或场景拥有自己独立的目标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If on, deleting words will count as negative words written. You cannot go below zero for a session.
ast.target: 如果开启，删除的单词将计为负的已写字数。单次会话中不会低于零。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Number of sessions to store locally.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Where your writing session data is stored. By default, data is stored alongside other Longform settings in the plugin’s data.json file. You may instead store it in a separate .json file in the plugin folder, or in a file in your vault. You may want to do this for selective sync or git reasons.
ast.target: 您的写作会话数据存储位置。默认情况下，数据与其他Longform设置一起存储在插件的data.json文件中。您也可以将其存储在插件文件夹中的单独.json文件中，或保险库中的文件中。出于选择性同步或git原因，您可能希望这样做。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Location in your vault to store session JSON. Created if does not exist, overwritten if it does.
ast.target: 保险库中存储会话JSON的位置。如果不存在则创建，如果存在则覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prevent Longform from running until Obsidian Sync completes its first sync. If you are using Sync, you may want to enable this if you experience issues with scenes disappearing or falsely being shown as new.
ast.target: 防止Longform在Obsidian同步完成首次同步之前运行。如果您正在使用同步，当您遇到场景消失或错误显示为新场景的问题时，您可能希望启用此选项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If sync status cannot be detected, wait for the time specified below before looking for scenes.
ast.target: 如果无法检测到同步状态，请在下方指定的时间后查找场景。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Time to wait in seconds if sync status cannot be detected.
ast.target: 如果无法检测到同步状态，等待的时间（以秒为单位）。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show scene numbers in Scenes tab
ast.target: 在场景选项卡中显示场景编号

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show word counts in status bar
ast.target: 在状态栏显示字数统计

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Start new writing sessions each day
ast.target: 每天开始新的写作会话

ast.name: setTitle
ast.target: 在 Longform 中忽略此笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Obsidian cannot open files that begin with a dot. Consider a different name.
ast.target: Obsidian 无法打开以点开头的文件。请考虑使用其他名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A starter workflow. Feel free to edit, rename, or delete it and create your own.
ast.target: 一个入门工作流。您可以自由编辑、重命名或删除它，并创建自己的工作流。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Combines all scenes together in order into a manuscript.
ast.target: 按顺序将所有场景组合成一份手稿。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text to put between joined scenes.
ast.target: 在连接的场景之间插入的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Prepends the scene title to the scene text.
ast.target: 将场景标题添加到场景文本前面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Format of title. $1 will be replaced with title. $2, if present, will be replaced with scene number. Wrapping text in $3{} will repeat that text a number of times equal to the scene’s indentation level plus one—e.g., $3{#} for unindented scenes becomes “#”.
ast.target: 标题格式。$1 将被替换为标题。如果存在 $2，将被替换为场景编号。将文本包裹在 $3{} 中，将根据场景的缩进级别加一重复该文本——例如，对于未缩进的场景，$3{#} 会变成 “#”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text to put between title and scene text.
ast.target: 在标题和场景文本之间插入的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Saves your manuscript as a note in your vault.
ast.target: 将您的手稿保存为保险库中的笔记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path for the created manuscript note, relative to your project. $1 will be replaced with your project’s title.
ast.target: 创建的手稿笔记的路径，相对于您的项目。$1 将被替换为您的项目标题。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If checked, open the compiled manuscript in a new pane.
ast.target: 如果勾选，将在新窗格中打开编译后的手稿。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Add YAML frontmatter to your manuscript
ast.target: 为您的手稿添加 YAML 前置元数据

ast.name: description
ast.source: YAML to be added to your manuscript's frontmatter.
ast.target: 要添加到手稿前置元数据中的 YAML。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Compile current project with current workflow
ast.target: 使用当前工作流编译当前项目

ast.name: name
ast.target: 上一个同缩进级别场景

ast.name: name
ast.target: 下一个同缩进级别场景

ast.name: name
ast.source: Jump to scene in current project
ast.target: 跳转到当前项目中的场景

ast.name: name
ast.target: 在导航中显示当前项目

ast.name: name
ast.target: 插入多场景前置元数据

ast.name: name
ast.target: 插入单场景前置元数据

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: Click here to leave a description of your workflow…
ast.target: 点击此处为您的工作流添加描述…

ast.name: text
ast.target: 向工作流添加编译步骤
